citations: Input text: "AI memory systems need durable source evidence. Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable. A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state."

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall.
The application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.

details: Created atomic memory cards for each distinct claim.

No conflicts or entity merges were identified.
